features.featureTitle: Restore `frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx` to a fully functional, visually complete login page with AstraVault branding: matte black (#0a0a0a) background, gold (#c9a84c / #d4af37) and military-green (#2d4a1e / #3a5c28) accents, shield/command iconography, Rajdhani/Inter fonts, and a single 'Login with Internet Identity' button wired to the `useInternetIdentity` hook's `login` function. Already-authenticated users (identity resolved and non-anonymous) must be automatically redirected to `/`. The page must be accessible at the `/login` route for all unauthenticated users.

Restore `frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts` so that `isActorReady` is `true` only when all three conditions are strictly met in order: (a) `isInitializing` from `useInternetIdentity` is `false`, (b) the principal is non-anonymous (not equal to `Principal.anonymous()`), and (c) the actor instance returned by `useActor` is non-null. The hook must never flip `isActorReady` to `true` prematurely. Export `isActorReady` as a stable boolean.

Restore `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` so the `useGetProfile` query: (1) has its `enabled` flag strictly gated on `isActorReady === true`; (2) includes the authenticated principal string in the React Query cache key (e.g. `['profile', principalText]`) so it auto-invalidates when the principal changes; (3) treats a `null` / empty optional returned by the backend as 'profile not found' (new user flow), not as an error; (4) treats only a thrown exception as a genuine fetch failure (`isError`). All other query hooks in the file that call backend functions must also gate their `enabled` flag on `isActorReady`.

Restore `frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx` to the strict state machine: (1) While `isActorReady` is `false` OR the profile query `isLoading` is `true` â†’ render a full-page military-themed loading spinner (no redirect, no children rendered). (2) If `isError` is `true` â†’ render a full-page error state with a gold-accented 'Retry' button that calls `refetch()`. (3) If the user is definitively unauthenticated (not logged in AND actor initialization is complete) â†’ redirect to `/login`. (4) If `data` is `null` (profile not found, new user) â†’ render `<ProfileSetupModal>` without redirecting. (5) If profile data is present â†’ render `<Outlet />` / children. The component must never redirect to `/login` during the loading phase.

Restore `frontend/src/App.tsx` to the Version 4 routing structure with routes: `/login` (public, LoginPage), `/` (protected, DashboardPage), `/vault` (protected, VaultPage), `/settings` (protected, SettingsPage). The `AuthGuard` component must render only the full-page military-themed loading spinner while `isInitializing` is `true` and must never redirect to `/login` or render protected content until `isInitializing` has definitively settled to `false`.

Restore `frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModal.tsx` to the Version 4 design: a full-screen modal for new users to register a profile with fields for name, username, optional email, and vault password (SHA-256 hashed client-side before submission). On successful registration, invalidate the `['profile', principalText]` React Query cache key so `ProtectedRoute` immediately transitions from the modal to the dashboard. Style the modal with the military theme (matte black background, gold accents, military-green buttons).
